title: chlorogalum pomeridianum subsp. austrooreganum
intro: Chlorogalum pomeridianum subsp. austrooreganum, also known as the Evening Glory Lilyturf or Western Sea Daffodil, is a type of flowering plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. Chlorogalum pomeridianum subsp. austrooreganum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
